title: Pleasantly Juicy Japanese Fideo Zenzai
description: A funky and cozy Japanese dish featuring fideo, with a balance of juicy and savory flavors, made in a traditional zenzai style with ayurvedic-rajasic friendly ingredients.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add grated ginger and minced garlic and saute for 1 minute.
Add sliced shiitake mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add fideo noodles to the pan and stir to combine with the mushroom mixture.
In a small bowl, whisk together miso paste, soy sauce, and mirin.
Pour the miso mixture over the noodles and mushrooms, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, or until the noodles are cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Stir in chopped green onions and serve hot.
